In [1]:
import uuid
from IPython.display import display, HTML

def create_hide_button():
    unique_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    display(HTML('''
        <script>
        function toggle_output(button_id) {
            var output_area = document.getElementById(button_id).parentElement.parentElement.nextElementSibling;
            var button = document.getElementById(button_id);
            if (output_area.style.display === "none") {
                output_area.style.display = "block";
                button.innerHTML = "Hide Output";
            } else {
                output_area.style.display = "none";
                button.innerHTML = "Show Output";
            }
        }
        </script>
    '''))

    button_id = f"button_{unique_id}"
    display(HTML(f'''
        <button id="{button_id}" onclick="toggle_output('{button_id}')">Show Output</button>
        <script>
            document.getElementById('{button_id}').parentElement.parentElement.nextElementSibling.style.display = 'none';
        </script>
    '''))

current_path = Path(__file__).resolve().parent if '__file__' in globals() else Path().resolve()

path_to_save_visuals = current_path.parent / 'visual'
save_type = ".eps"

experiment = 1

folder_path = current_path.parent.parent / 'data' / 'gold' / f'experiment_{experiment}'

Prepare results¶

In [8]:
def get_last_part(folder_name):
    return folder_name.rsplit('_', 1)[-1]

# Define dictionaries for replacements
replace_dict_model = {
    'Linear Regression': 'LR',
    'Lasso Regression': 'Lasso',
    'Random Forest': 'RF',
    'XGBoost': 'XGB',
    'Elastic Net': 'ENet'
}
replace_dict_label = {
    "selec_feat_all_lags": "causal-all", 
    "selec_feat_selec_lag": "causal-lag", 
    "edit_graph_keep_others": "causal-edit-keep",
    "graph_delete_other": "causal-edit-delete",
    "all_all": "All",  

    "feature_sel_RFE_all": "RFE_all", 
    "feature_sel_Lasso_all": "Lasso_all", 
    "feature_sel_PCA_all": "PCA_all", 
    "feature_sel_Tree-based_all": "Tree_all",

    "feature_sel_RFE_lag": "RFE_lag", 
    "feature_sel_Lasso_lag": "Lasso_lag", 
    "feature_sel_PCA_lag": "PCA_lag", 
    "feature_sel_Tree-based_lag": "Tree_lag",
}

def get_results(folder_path):
    list_results = []
    folder_names = [folder.name for folder in folder_path.iterdir() if folder.is_dir()]

    for folder_name in folder_names:
        several_folders = False
        path = Path(folder_path / folder_name)
        df_list = []

        # --- Use a dict to store lengths instead of locals() ---
        lengths = {}
        for fname, var in zip(
            ['train.parquet', 'test.parquet', 'graph_generator.parquet'],
            ['train_len', 'test_len', 'graph_generator_len']
        ):
            fpath = path / fname
            if fpath.exists():
                try:
                    df_tmp = pd.read_parquet(fpath)
                    lengths[var] = len(df_tmp)
                except Exception as e:
                    lengths[var] = None
            else:
                lengths[var] = None

        # Unpack the dict to variables
        train_len = lengths.get('train_len')
        test_len = lengths.get('test_len')
        graph_generator_len = lengths.get('graph_generator_len')

        if several_folders:
            for folder in path.iterdir():
                if folder.is_dir():
                    folder_suffix = get_last_part(folder.name)
                    for parquet_file in folder.glob('z1_results_evaluated_*.parquet'):
                        df = pd.read_parquet(parquet_file).reset_index()
                        df['folder_suffix'] = str(folder_suffix[2:])
                        df_list.append(df)
        else:
            folder = path
            folder_suffix = get_last_part(folder.name)
            for parquet_file in folder.glob('z1_results_evaluated_*.parquet'):
                df = pd.read_parquet(parquet_file).reset_index()
                df['folder_suffix'] = str(folder_suffix[2:])
                df_list.append(df)
        
        if not df_list:
            continue  # Move to the next experiment if any
        
        df = pd.concat(df_list, ignore_index=True)

        df['model'] = df['model'].replace(replace_dict_model)
        df['info'] = df['label']
        df['label'] = df['label'].replace(replace_dict_label)
        df['file'] = folder_name

        # --- Add the new columns with lengths ---
        df['train'] = train_len if train_len is not None else 0
        df['test'] = test_len if test_len is not None else 0
        df['graph_generator'] = graph_generator_len if graph_generator_len is not None else 0
        list_results.append(df.copy())

    results_df_all = pd.concat(list_results, ignore_index=True)

    df = results_df_all.copy()
    results_df_all = df.copy()

    results_df_all['extracted'] = results_df_all['file'].str.extract(r'__f([^_]+)_')[0]
    results_df_all['train_proportion'] = results_df_all['extracted'].astype(float) / 100
    results_df_all.loc[results_df_all['extracted'].isin(['1']), 'train_proportion'] = 1

    results_df = results_df_all[results_df_all['train_proportion'] == 1]
    results_df_window = results_df.copy()
    results_df = results_df[results_df['after_window'] == 1]

    return results_df, results_df_window, results_df_all

# Call the function
results_df, results_df_window, results_df_all = get_results(folder_path)

# Dict for renaming labels (FS method)
short_names_label = {
    'All': 'ALL',

    'RFE': 'RFE',
    'Lasso': 'LASSO',
    'PCA': 'PCA',
    'Tree': 'TREE',
    
    'edit_ko_PCMCI_0.01_0.01': 'DK&CDV_PCMCI',
    'edit_do_PCMCI_0.01_0.01': 'DK&CDL_PCMCI',


    'edited': 'DK',

    'edit_ko_PC_0.01_0.01': 'DK&CDV_PC',
    'edit_do_PC_0.01_0.01': 'DK&CDL_PC',
    
    'VARLINGAM_0.03': 'VARL',
    
    'PC_0.01': 'PC',
    'PCMCI_0.01': 'PCMCI',

    'DYNOTEARS_0.01': 'DT',

}



replacements = {
        "lag_1_": "",                           
        "alpha": "",                           
        "edit_graph_keep_others": "edit_ko",    
        "edit_graph_delete_others": "edit_do",  
        "selec_feat_selec_lag": "",
        "selec_feat_all_lags": "",
        "_all_": "",
        "0.5": "",
        "0.1": "",
        "0.5_0.5": "0.05",
        "0.01_0.01": "0.01",
        "_all": "",
        "_lag": "",
    }


def df_clean_label(df, replacements):
    df["lag_type"] = df["label"].apply(
        lambda x: "select_lag" if isinstance(x, str) and x.strip().endswith("lag") else "all_lags"
    )
    # Clean the label (FS method) names

    # Apply regex-based replacements in cell strings
    df["label"] = df["label"].replace(replacements, regex=True)

    #Now normalize underscores separately
    df["label"] = (
        df["label"]
        .str.replace("__+", "_", regex=True)  
        .str.strip("_")                       
    )


    return df



def prepare_results(results_df: pd.DataFrame, replacements) -> pd.DataFrame:
    """
    Clean and prepare results data for visualization:
    - Cleans labels (via df_clean_label)
    - Extracts file ID between __...__
    - Creates combined file_target column
    - Maps Source groups from file names
    - Classifies feature selection methods into categories
    """
    
    # Copy to avoid changing original
    df = results_df.copy()

    df['lag_type'] = df['label'].str.split('_').str[-1]
    df['lag_type'] = df['lag_type'].replace({
        'lag': 'lag',
        'lags': 'lag',
        'all': 'all', 
        'All': 'all'
    })
    
    df = df_clean_label(df, replacements)  
    
    df = df[df['model'].isin(models)]
    
    df['file'] = df["file"].str.extract(r"__(.*?)__")
    df['file_target'] = df['file'] + '_' + df['target']

    category_map_dc = {
        'df_exp_1': 'MiniDC',
        'df_exp_2': 'MiniDC',
        'df_exp_3': 'MiniDC',
        'df_exp_4': 'MiniDC',
        'df_exp_5': 'MiniDC',
        'df_5m': 'DC2',
        'df_h': 'DC2',

        'df_rack_1': 'DC1',
        'df_rack_2': 'DC1',
        'df_rack_3': 'DC1',

        'df_sim_1': 'Sim',
        'df_sim_2': 'Sim',
        'df_sim_3': 'Sim',
        'df_sim_4': 'Sim',
        'df_sim_5': 'Sim',

        'df_exp_1': 'MiniDC',
        'df_exp_2': 'MiniDC',
        'df_exp_3': 'MiniDC',
        'df_exp_4': 'MiniDC',
        'df_exp_5': 'MiniDC',
    }

    
    df['Source'] = df['file'].map(category_map_dc).fillna('not_found')
    df['label'] = df['label'].replace(short_names_label, regex=True)

    # Define the categories
    df['category'] = df['label']
    df['category'] = df['category'].replace({
            'DK': 'DK',
            'RFE': 'TFS',
            'LASSO': 'TFS',
            'PCA': 'TFS',
            'TREE': 'TFS',
            'PC': 'CD',
            'PCMCI': 'CD',
            'VARL': 'CD',
            'DT': 'CD',

            'DK&CDV_PC': 'DK&CDV',
            'DK&CDL_PC': 'DK&CDL',

            'DK&CDV_PCMCI': 'DK&CDV',
            'DK&CDL_PCMCI': 'DK&CDL',
    })

    return df

df = prepare_results(results_df, replacements)



df_prepared = df.copy()
#df_prepared.head()

df = df_prepared.copy()

# Group and count
table_df = (
    df
    .groupby(['category', 'label'])
    .size()
    .reset_index(name='count')
    .sort_values(['count', 'category', 'label'], ascending=False)
)

display(table_df)

# Add an empty 'comment' column
table_df['comment'] = ''

# Escape special LaTeX characters just in case
table_df['label'] = table_df['label'].astype(str).str.replace('&', r'\&', regex=False)
table_df['label'] = table_df['label'].astype(str).str.replace('_', r'\_', regex=False)
table_df['category'] = table_df['category'].astype(str).str.replace('&', r'\&', regex=False)

# Print the DataFrame in LaTeX tabular format
print(table_df.to_latex(index=False, escape=False))

Missing targets for some Causal discovery methods¶

In [14]:
# Get all possible file_target values
all_targets = set(df['file_target'].unique())

# Count existing combinations
counts = (
    df.groupby(['category', 'label', 'lag_type'])['file_target']
      .unique()
      .reset_index(name='available_targets')
)

# Find missing targets per group
counts['missing_targets'] = counts['available_targets'].apply(
    lambda x: sorted(list(all_targets - set(x)))
)

# Keep only groups missing one or more targets
missing_targets = counts[counts['missing_targets'].apply(len) > 0].copy()

missing_targets

Complete results for every file, target, FS method and lag strategy for all experiments¶

-- NOTE

  • MAE, WAPE and RMSE are the metrics on the compelte testset
  • MAE_WINDOW, WAPE_WINDOW and RMSE_WINDOW are the metrics on the compelte testset
In [15]:
# Set options to display all rows and columns
pd.set_option('display.max_rows', None)
pd.set_option('display.max_columns', None)

# User-specified aggregation type (not used now, but kept)
aggregation_type = 'median'  # or 'mean'

# Copy and prepare the results
df = results_df.copy()
df = prepare_results(df, replacements)

# df = df[df['label'].isin(['TREE', 'PC'])]
# df = df[df['model'].isin(['LSTM'])]

# --- Compute rank across models per file_target, label ---


evaluate = {
    'complete_test_set': ['mae', 'wape', 'rmse'],
    'after_intervention': ['mae_window', 'wape_window', 'rmse_window']
}

# Get unique file_targets
file_targets = df['file_target'].unique()

for eval_type, metrics in evaluate.items():
    print(f"Evaluation Type: {eval_type}")
    
    for file_target in sorted(file_targets):
        print(f"Dataset-target: {file_target}")

        # Filter df for this file_target
        df_ft = df[df['file_target'] == file_target].copy()
        
        # Select columns
        columns_to_show = ['category', 'label', 'model', 'lag_type'] + metrics
        df_ft = df_ft[columns_to_show]
        
        # Sort by the first metric
        df_ft = df_ft.sort_values(metrics[0])
        
        # Round metrics
        for metric in metrics:
            if metric in df_ft.columns:
                df_ft[metric] = df_ft[metric].round(4)
        if 'wape' in metrics and 'wape' in df_ft.columns:
            df_ft['wape'] = df_ft['wape'].round(2)
        if 'wape_window' in metrics and 'wape_window' in df_ft.columns:
            df_ft['wape_window'] = df_ft['wape_window'].round(2)
        
        # Escape LaTeX special characters if needed, but since displaying, maybe not
        df_ft['label'] = df_ft['label'].str.replace('&', r'\&', regex=False)
        df_ft['category'] = df_ft['category'].str.replace('&', r'\&', regex=False)
        

        df_display = df_ft.reset_index(drop=True)

        if show_all_results:
            display(HTML(df_display.to_html(max_rows=None, max_cols=None)))
        else:
            display(df_display)

Aggregated results per feature selection method¶

In [16]:
results_df['model'].unique()
Out[16]:
array(['LR', 'XGB', 'LGBM', 'MLP', 'NHITS', 'TSMixerx', 'LSTM'],
      dtype=object)
In [18]:
df_fs = results_df.copy()
df_fs = prepare_results(df_fs, replacements)
categories_model_type = {
    'TSMixerx': 'TSForecasting',
    'NHITS': 'TSForecasting',
    'LSTM': 'TSForecasting',
    'LR': 'Regression', 
    'XGB': 'Regression', 
    'LGBM': 'Regression',
    'MLP': 'Regression'
}
df_fs['model_category'] = df_fs['model'].map(categories_model_type)
df_fs = df_fs[['label', 'features', 'lag_type','model_category', 'category','file_target', 'model','graph_name','mae', 'n features']]
df_fs['nr_features'] = df_fs['features'].apply(lambda x: len(x))


df_fs_grouped = df_fs.groupby(['graph_name','label',  'lag_type', 'category', 'model_category', 'file_target']).agg({'nr_features': ['mean','min','max'], 'mae': 'mean'}).reset_index()

df_fs_unique = df_fs[['label', 'features', 'lag_type','model_category', 'category','file_target', 'nr_features']].drop_duplicates(subset=['label',  'lag_type', 'category', 'model_category', 'file_target'])
max_features_per_target = df_fs_unique[df_fs_unique['label'] == 'ALL']

def calculate_perc_features(row):
    total_features = max_features_per_target[(max_features_per_target['file_target'] == row['file_target']) & (max_features_per_target['model_category'] == row['model_category'])]['nr_features']
    if total_features.empty:
        raise ValueError(f"No total features found for target {row['file_target']} and model_category {row['model_category']}")
    total_features = total_features.values[0]
    if total_features == 0:
        return 0
    return (row['nr_features'] / total_features) * 100
df_fs_unique['perc_features'] = df_fs_unique.apply(calculate_perc_features, axis=1)


df_perc_features = df_fs_unique.groupby(['label', 'model_category', 'lag_type', 'category'])['perc_features'].mean().round(2).reset_index().sort_values('perc_features', ascending=False)
df_perc_features_all = df_fs_unique.groupby(['label', 'lag_type', 'category'])['perc_features'].mean().round(1).reset_index().sort_values('perc_features', ascending=False)

#### Aggregated evaluation tables
aggregation_type = 'median'  # or 'mean'

# Copy and prepare the results
df = results_df.copy()
df = prepare_results(df, replacements)


# --- Compute aggregated metrics ---
def compute_aggregated_metric(df, metric, agg_type):
    agg_metric_by_label_lag = (
        df.groupby(['label', 'lag_type'])[metric]
        .agg(agg_type)
        .reset_index(name=f'{agg_type}_{metric}')
    )
    return agg_metric_by_label_lag


evaluate = {
    'complete_test_set': ['mae', 'wape', 'rmse'],
    'after_intervention': ['mae_window', 'wape_window', 'rmse_window']
}

for eval_type, metrics in evaluate.items():
    print(f"\n=== Evaluation Type: {eval_type} ===")

    # Compute aggregation for each metric
    aggregated_results = {}
    for metric in metrics:
        aggregated_results[metric] = compute_aggregated_metric(df, metric, aggregation_type)

    # Merge all metrics into one DataFrame
    combined_df = aggregated_results[metrics[0]][['label', 'lag_type', f'{aggregation_type}_{metrics[0]}']].copy()
    for metric in metrics[1:]:
        temp_df = aggregated_results[metric][['label', 'lag_type', f'{aggregation_type}_{metric}']]
        combined_df = combined_df.merge(temp_df, on=['label', 'lag_type'], how='left')

    # Rename columns to clean metric names
    rename_dict = {f'{aggregation_type}_{metric}': metric for metric in metrics}
    combined_df.rename(columns=rename_dict, inplace=True)

    # Merge category info
    combined_df = pd.merge(
        combined_df,
        df[['label', 'category']].drop_duplicates(),
        on='label',
        how='left'
    )

    # add percentage features info
    combined_df = pd.merge(
        combined_df,
        df_perc_features_all,
        on=['label', 'lag_type', 'category'],
        how='left'
    )

    # Reorder columns so median_rank is last
    columns_order = ['category', 'label', 'lag_type', 'perc_features'] + metrics 
    combined_df = combined_df[columns_order]

    # Sort and format
    combined_df = combined_df.sort_values(metrics[0])
    for metric in metrics:
        combined_df[metric] = combined_df[metric].round(4)
    combined_df[metrics[1]] = combined_df[metrics[1]].round(2)
    # combined_df['median_rank'] = combined_df['median_rank'].round(4)

    combined_df['label'] = combined_df['label'].replace({'DK&CDL_': '', 'DK&CDV_': ''}, regex=True)

    # Escape LaTeX special characters
    combined_df['label'] = combined_df['label'].str.replace('&', r'\&', regex=False)
    combined_df['category'] = combined_df['category'].str.replace('&', r'\&', regex=False)

    # --- Build LaTeX table with bold lowest per _column_ (including median_rank) ---
    def to_latex_with_bold(df, metrics):
        # Include median_rank in the bold evaluation
        all_metrics = metrics 

        # Find min per metric column
        min_per_metric = {m: df[m].min() for m in all_metrics}

        latex_str = f"\\begin{{tabular}}{{{'l' * len(df.columns)}}}\n\\hline\n"
        latex_str += " & ".join(df.columns) + " \\\\\n\\hline\n"

        for _, row in df.iterrows():
            row_strs = []
            for col in df.columns:
                val = row[col]
                if col in all_metrics:
                    if 'wape' in col:
                        formatted_val = f"{val:.2f}"
                    else:
                        formatted_val = f"{val:.4f}"
                    # Bold the lowest value for each metric column and for median_rank
                    if val == min_per_metric[col]:
                        row_strs.append(f"\\textbf{{{formatted_val}}}")
                    else:
                        row_strs.append(formatted_val)
                else:
                    row_strs.append(str(val).replace('_', '\\_'))
            latex_str += " & ".join(row_strs) + " \\\\\n"

        latex_str += "\\hline\n\\end{tabular}"
        return latex_str

    df_display = combined_df.reset_index(drop=True)

    if show_all_results:
        display(HTML(df_display.to_html(max_rows=None, max_cols=None)))
    else:
        display(df_display)
        print("\nLaTeX for Combined Table:")
        print(to_latex_with_bold(combined_df, metrics))

Visualization of results¶

Evaluation of method and model¶

In [19]:
# Set style to white background without gridlines
sns.set_style("white")

for metric in ['mae', 'mae_window']:
    print(f"Generating heatmap for metric: {metric}")

    df = results_df.copy()
    df = prepare_results(df, replacements)

    column_1 = 'label'
    column_2 = 'model'

    df = df[~df[column_1].isin(['PCA', 'DT'])]

    df['label'] = df.apply(lambda row: row['category'] + '_' + row['label'] if '_' not in row['label'] else row['label'], axis=1).replace("ALL_ALL", 'ALL').replace("DK_DK", 'DK')

    # Compute consistent label order based on overall median MAE across all combinations
    median_mae_all = df.groupby([column_1, column_2, 'lag_type'])[metric].median().reset_index()

    # Get overall median per label and merge category
    overall_median = median_mae_all.groupby(column_1)[metric].median().reset_index()
    overall_median = overall_median.merge(df[['label', 'category']].drop_duplicates(), left_on=column_1, right_on='label')

    # Define desired category order - ALL at the top
    desired_order = ['ALL', 'TFS', 'CD', 'DK', 'DK&CDV', 'DK&CDL']

    # Set category as categorical with desired order
    overall_median['category'] = pd.Categorical(overall_median['category'], categories=desired_order, ordered=True)

    # Sort by category, then by metric within category
    overall_median = overall_median.sort_values(['category', metric])
    label_order = overall_median[column_1].tolist()

    # Group by label, model, and lag_type, compute median MAE
    median_mae = df.groupby([column_1, column_2, 'lag_type'])[metric].median().reset_index()
    # Define model order
    models = ['LR', 'XGB', 'LGBM', 'MLP', 'NHITS', 'TSMixerx', 'LSTM']

    # Create separate heatmap data for each lag type
    heatmap_all_lags = (
        median_mae[median_mae['lag_type'] == 'all_lags']
        .pivot(index=column_1, columns=column_2, values=metric)
        .reindex(columns=models, index=label_order)
    )

    heatmap_select_lag = (
        median_mae[median_mae['lag_type'] == 'select_lag']
        .pivot(index=column_1, columns=column_2, values=metric)
        .reindex(columns=[m for m in models if m not in ['NHITS', 'TSMixerx', 'LSTM']], index=label_order)
    )

    # Combine the two heatmaps side by side
    heatmap_data = pd.concat([heatmap_all_lags, heatmap_select_lag], axis=1)

    # Create column labels without lag suffix (just model names)
    col_labels_all = models
    col_labels_select = [m for m in models if m not in ['NHITS', 'TSMixerx', 'LSTM']]
    col_labels = col_labels_all + col_labels_select

    # Find category boundaries for horizontal lines
    category_boundaries = []
    prev_category = None
    for idx, label in enumerate(label_order):
        current_category = overall_median[overall_median[column_1] == label]['category'].values[0]
        if prev_category is not None and current_category != prev_category:
            category_boundaries.append(idx)
        prev_category = current_category

    # Create a single heatmap with white background
    fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(16, 15), facecolor='white')
    ax.set_facecolor('white')

    # Plot heatmap
    sns.heatmap(heatmap_data, annot=True, fmt=".4f", cmap="mako_r", 
                #cbar_kws={'label': f'Median {metric.upper()}'}, 
                ax=ax,
                xticklabels=col_labels)

    # Add vertical separator line between the two lag type groups
    separator_x = len(models)
    ax.axvline(x=separator_x, color='grey', linewidth=3)

    # Add group labels below the x-axis
    fig.text(0.38, 0.02, 'Models with all lags', ha='center', fontsize=22)
    fig.text(0.70, 0.02, 'Models with select lags', ha='center', fontsize=22)

    plt.ylabel('Feature Selection Method')
    plt.xlabel('')
    plt.xticks(rotation=45, ha='right')
    plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0.04, 1, 0.96])

    if save_visuals:
        plt.savefig(
            f"{path_to_save_visuals}/heatmap_{metric}{save_type}",
            dpi=resolution,
            bbox_inches="tight",
        )

    plt.show()

plt.rcParams.update({
    'font.size': 18,              # Default font size
    'axes.titlesize': 22,         # Title font size
    'axes.labelsize': 25,         # Axis label size
    'xtick.labelsize': 18,        # X-axis tick label size
    'ytick.labelsize': 18,        # Y-axis tick label size
    'legend.fontsize': 19,        # Legend font size
    'figure.titlesize': 20,       # Figure title size (if any)
    'grid.linewidth': 1.2         # Slightly bolder grid lines
})

Evalaution of models¶

Boxplots of resutls per model and best model per feature selection method¶

In [20]:
results_df['model'].unique()
Out[20]:
array(['LR', 'XGB', 'LGBM', 'MLP', 'NHITS', 'TSMixerx', 'LSTM'],
      dtype=object)
In [21]:
lag_types = ["all_lags", "select_lag"]


sns.set_style("whitegrid")

metrics = ['mae', 'mae_window']

plt.rcParams.update({
    "font.size": 15,        
    "axes.titlesize": 18,   
    "axes.labelsize": 18,   
    "legend.fontsize": 15,  
    "grid.linewidth": 1.0,
    "xtick.labelsize": 12,  
    "ytick.labelsize": 12   
})

custom_palette = [
    "#26ad38",  
    "#6788d4",  
    "#67aed4",  
    "#b184db",  

    "#e5af30",  
    "#e59430",  
    "#b16c17",  

    "#8565cb", 

    "#6788d4",  
]

for metric in metrics:
    print(metric)

    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(15, 8)) 
    fig.dpi = resolution

    df_all_lags = results_df.copy()
    df_all_lags = prepare_results(df_all_lags, replacements)

    
    df_all_lags = df_all_lags[df_all_lags["lag_type"] == "all_lags"]

    desired_model_order = ['LR', 'XGB', 'LGBM', 'MLP', 'NHITS', 'TSMixerx', 'LSTM']
    all_models = [m for m in desired_model_order if m in df_all_lags["model"].unique()]
    n_models = len(all_models)
    palette = custom_palette[:n_models]  
    color_map = dict(zip(all_models, palette))

    for i, lag_type in enumerate(lag_types):
        ax = axes[i]

        df = results_df.copy()
        df = prepare_results(df, replacements)
        df = df[df["lag_type"] == lag_type]

        if df.empty:
            ax.text(0.5, 0.5, f"No data for {lag_type}", ha="center", va="center", fontsize=20)  
            ax.axis("off")
            continue

        dfs_rank = []
        for category, sub_df in df.groupby('category'):
            sub_df[f'rank_{metric}'] = sub_df.groupby(['lag_type', 'file_target'])[metric].rank(
                method='min', ascending=True
            )
            best_df = sub_df[sub_df[f'rank_{metric}'] == 1]

            model_best = (
                best_df.groupby(['category', 'model'])[f'rank_{metric}']
                .count()
                .sort_values(ascending=False)
                .reset_index()
            )
            dfs_rank.append(model_best)

        if not dfs_rank:
            ax.text(0.5, 0.5, f"No data for {lag_type}", ha="center", va="center", fontsize=20) 
            ax.axis("off")
            continue

        best_models = pd.concat(dfs_rank)
        best_models[f'rank_{metric}_percentage'] = (
            best_models[f"rank_{metric}"] /
            best_models.groupby(['category'])[f'rank_{metric}'].transform('sum') * 100
        ).round(2)

        pivot_df = best_models.pivot(
            index='category',
            columns='model',
            values=f'rank_{metric}_percentage'
        ).fillna(0)

        for model in all_models:
            if model not in pivot_df.columns:
                pivot_df[model] = 0

        pivot_df = pivot_df[all_models]  

        desired_order = ['ALL', 'TFS', 'CD', 'DK', 'DK&CDL', 'DK&CDV']
        available_categories = [cat for cat in desired_order if cat in pivot_df.index]
        pivot_df = pivot_df.loc[available_categories]

        # Stack bars
        bottom = pd.Series([0] * len(pivot_df), index=pivot_df.index)
        for model in all_models:
            heights = pivot_df[model]
            bars = ax.bar(
                pivot_df.index,
                heights,
                bottom=bottom,
                color=color_map[model],
                label=model,
                width=0.6
            )

            for j, (cat, val) in enumerate(heights.items()):
                if val > 2:  
                    ax.text(
                        j,                             
                        bottom[cat] + val / 2,          
                        f"{val:.0f}",  # Changed to round to nearest integer (e.g., 38.71 -> 39)
                        ha='center', va='center',
                        fontsize=10, color='black', fontweight='bold'  
                    )
            bottom += heights

        # Customize
        ax.set_xlabel('Category', fontsize=14)  
        ax.set_ylabel(f'% Best Rank' + f' ({lag_type.replace("_", " ").title()})', fontsize=14)  
        ax.set_xticks(range(len(pivot_df.index)))
        ax.set_xticklabels(pivot_df.index, rotation=45, ha='right')
        ax.set_ylim(0, 100) 

    plt.tight_layout()

    handles = [plt.Rectangle((0, 0), 1, 1, color=color_map[m]) for m in all_models]
    fig.legend(
        handles,
        all_models,
        title='Model',
        loc='lower center',
        bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.08),
        ncol=max(1, len(all_models)),
        fontsize=14  # Added fontsize for larger text
    )
    if "save_visuals" in locals() and save_visuals:
        plt.savefig(
            str(path_to_save_visuals) + f"/model_comparison_{metric}" + save_type,
            dpi=resolution,
            bbox_inches="tight",
        )

    plt.show()

mae

The PostScript backend does not support transparency; partially transparent artists will be rendered opaque.

mae_window

The PostScript backend does not support transparency; partially transparent artists will be rendered opaque.

Evaluate training and test size¶

In [22]:
df = prepare_results(results_df_all, replacements)
df['train_proportion'] = df['train_proportion'] * 10
df['train_proportion'] = df['train_proportion'].replace(10, 1)
df_prepared_proportions = df.copy()

Percentage of MAE change for dataset proportion¶

In [23]:
df = df_prepared_proportions.copy()

df = df[~df['label'].isin(['PCA', 'DT'])]

df['label'] = df.apply(lambda row: row['category'] + '_' + row['label'] if '_' not in row['label'] else row['label'], axis=1).replace("ALL_ALL", 'ALL').replace("DK_DK", 'DK')
df['label'] = df['label'] + "_" + df['lag_type']



df = df.loc[df.groupby(['file_target', 'label', 'train', 'category'])['mae'].idxmin()].reset_index(drop=True)


df = df.sort_values(['file_target', 'label', 'train', 'category'], ascending=False)

df['train_proportion'] = df['train_proportion'] * 10
df['train_proportion'] = df['train_proportion'].replace(10, 1)


df['mae_pct_change'] = df.groupby(['file_target', 'label', 'category'])['mae'].pct_change() * 100




df[['file_target', 'label', 'train', 'mae', 'train_proportion', 'mae_pct_change', 'category']]

df_percentage = df.copy()



df = df_percentage.groupby(['label', 'category'])['mae_pct_change'].mean().reset_index()




df = df.sort_values('mae_pct_change', ascending=False)


label_order = df['label'].tolist()

color = ["#908E8EC6", "#66b366", "#b795c9", "#6ca0bc", "#a0e8ea", "#f0a9a9"]

label_color_map = {
    'ALL': "#333333",      
    'CD': "#66b366",  
    'DK': "#6ca0bc",  
    'DK&CDL': "#a0e8ea",  
    'DK&CDV': "#b795c9",   
    'TFS': "#f0a9a9"  
}


plt.figure(figsize=(8, 6))
ax = sns.barplot(
    data=df,
    x='mae_pct_change',
    y='label',
    hue='category',
    order=label_order,
    palette=label_color_map
)


for p in ax.patches:
    width = p.get_width()
    if width != 0: 
        ax.annotate(f'{width:.2f}', 
                    (width, p.get_y() + p.get_height() / 2), 
                    ha='left', va='center', fontsize=10, color='black')


plt.xlabel('Average MAE % Change')
plt.ylabel('Feature selection method and lag strategy')
plt.legend(title='Category')
plt.tight_layout()

ax.set_xlim(right=60)

if save_visuals:
    plt.savefig(str(path_to_save_visuals) + '/' + 'percentage_change_train_proportion' + save_type, dpi=resolution, bbox_inches='tight')

plt.tight_layout()


plt.show()

The PostScript backend does not support transparency; partially transparent artists will be rendered opaque.
In [24]:
df = df_prepared_proportions.copy()

df = df[~df['label'].isin(['PCA', 'DT'])]
df = df[~df['label'].isin(['PCA_all_lags', 'PCA_select_lag', 'DT_all_lags', 'DT_select_lag'])]


df['label'] = df['category'] 

df = df[df['lag_type'].isin(['all_lags', 'select_lag'])]



df = df.loc[df.groupby(['train_proportion', 'label', 'category', 'file_target', 'lag_type'])['mae'].idxmin()]


df_plot = df.groupby(['train_proportion', 'category', 'lag_type'], as_index=False)['mae'].mean()


lag_types = ['select_lag', 'all_lags']  

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 2, figsize=(12, 7))

color = ["#908E8EC6", "#66b366", "#b795c9", "#6ca0bc", "#a0e8ea", "#f0a9a9"]

label_color_map = {
    'ALL': "#333333",      
    'CD': "#66b366",  
    'DK': "#6ca0bc",  
    'DK&CDL': "#a0e8ea",  
    'DK&CDV': "#b795c9",   
    'TFS': "#f0a9a9"  
}

categories = df_plot['category'].unique()
extra_categories = [cat for cat in categories if cat not in label_color_map]
if extra_categories:
    extra_palette = sns.color_palette("tab20", n_colors=len(extra_categories))
    for cat, col in zip(extra_categories, extra_palette):
        label_color_map[cat] = col


for i, lag_type in enumerate(lag_types):
    ax = axes[i]
    df_lag = df_plot[df_plot['lag_type'] == lag_type]
    
    for category in categories:
        df_cat = df_lag[df_lag['category'] == category].sort_values('train_proportion')
        x = df_cat['train_proportion'].values
        y = df_cat['mae'].values
        color_cat = label_color_map[category]
        if len(x) > 0:
            ax.plot(x, y, color=color_cat, linewidth=2.0, alpha=0.95, label=f"{category}", zorder=2)
    
    ax.set_xlabel('Train proportion')
    ax.set_ylabel('MAE')
    ax.set_title(f'MAE vs train proportion for {lag_type}')
    

    x_ticks = np.sort(df_lag['train_proportion'].unique())
    ax.set_xticks(x_ticks)
    ax.set_xticklabels([str(x) for x in x_ticks])

    
    ax.invert_xaxis()  
    ax.set_ylim(0.1, 0.35)  


legend_elements = [
    Line2D([0], [0], color=label_color_map[cat], lw=2.0, label=f"{cat}", alpha=0.95)
    for cat in categories
]
fig.legend(handles=legend_elements, title='Category', loc='lower center', bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.1), ncol=len(categories), fontsize=14, title_fontsize=16)

plt.tight_layout()

if save_visuals:
    plt.savefig(str(path_to_save_visuals) + '/' + 'mae_change_train_proportion' + save_type, dpi=resolution, bbox_inches='tight')

plt.show()

The PostScript backend does not support transparency; partially transparent artists will be rendered opaque.

Additional experiments¶

Evaluate duration of feature selection¶

In [25]:
current_path = Path(__file__).resolve().parent if '__file__' in globals() else Path().resolve()

experiment = 2

current_path_duration = current_path.parent.parent / 'data' / 'gold' / f'experiment_{experiment}'
In [38]:
dfs = []


for parquet_file in current_path_duration.rglob('feature_selection_timing.parquet'):
    try:
        df = pd.read_parquet(parquet_file)

        subfolder_name = parquet_file.parent.parent.name
        source = subfolder_name.split('__')[1] if '__' in subfolder_name else subfolder_name
        df['source'] = source
        dfs.append(df)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error reading {parquet_file}: {e}")

if dfs:
    combined_df = pd.concat(dfs, ignore_index=True) 
else:
    print("No 'feature_selection_timing.parquet' files found.")
In [27]:
dfs = []


for parquet_file in current_path_duration.rglob('feature_selection_timing.parquet'):
    try:
        df = pd.read_parquet(parquet_file)

        subfolder_name = parquet_file.parent.parent.name
        source = subfolder_name.split('__')[1] if '__' in subfolder_name else subfolder_name
        df['source'] = source
        dfs.append(df)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f"Error reading {parquet_file}: {e}")


if dfs:
    combined_df = pd.concat(dfs, ignore_index=True)
    print(combined_df.head()) 
    

    combined_df['feature_selection_method'] = combined_df['feature_selection_method'].str.split('_').str[0]

    # Replace specific method names
    combined_df['feature_selection_method'] = combined_df['feature_selection_method'].replace({
        'Tree-based': 'TFS_TREE',
        'Lasso': 'TFS_LASSO',
        'DYNOTEARS': 'CD_DT',
        'VARLINGAM': 'CD_VARL',
        # 'PCA': 'TFS_PCA',
        'PC': 'CD_PC',
        'PCMCI': 'CD_PCMCI',
        'RFE': 'TFS_RFE',


    })



    # Remove PCA
    combined_df = combined_df[combined_df['feature_selection_method'] != 'PCA']

    replace_dict = {
        'df_exp': 'MiniDC',
        'df_h': 'DC2_2',
        'df_5m': 'DC2_1',
        'df_sim': 'Sim',
        'df_rack': 'DC1',
    }

    def replace_func(s):
        for k, v in replace_dict.items():
            s = s.replace(k, v)
        return s

    combined_df['source'] = combined_df['source'].apply(replace_func)

    # Compute dimension per source
    dimension_df = combined_df.groupby('source').agg({'train_size': 'mean', 'total_original_features': 'mean'}).reset_index()
    dimension_df['dimension'] = dimension_df['train_size'] * dimension_df['total_original_features']
    dimension_dict = dimension_df.set_index('source')['dimension'].to_dict()


    grouped_df = combined_df.groupby(['source', 'feature_selection_method'])['duration'].median().reset_index(name='mean_duration')
    

    matrix_df = grouped_df.pivot(index='source', columns='feature_selection_method', values='mean_duration')
    

    matrix_df = matrix_df.round(4)
    

    matrix_df = matrix_df.reset_index()
    

    matrix_df = matrix_df.merge(dimension_df[['source', 'train_size', 'total_original_features']], on='source', how='left')
    

    matrix_df['train_size'] = matrix_df['train_size'].astype(int)
    matrix_df['total_original_features'] = matrix_df['total_original_features'].astype(int)
    

    matrix_df['datapoints'] = matrix_df['train_size'] * matrix_df['total_original_features']
    

    method_columns = [col for col in matrix_df.columns if col not in ['source', 'train_size', 'total_original_features', 'datapoints']]
    matrix_df = matrix_df[['source', 'train_size', 'total_original_features'] + method_columns]
    

    numeric_cols = matrix_df.select_dtypes(include=[np.number]).columns
    median_row = matrix_df[numeric_cols].median()
    median_row['source'] = 'Median'
    median_row = median_row.to_frame().T
    matrix_df = pd.concat([matrix_df, median_row], ignore_index=True)
    

    for col in ['train_size', 'total_original_features']:
        matrix_df[col] = matrix_df[col].apply(lambda x: f"{int(x):,}" if pd.notna(x) else '')
    

    display(matrix_df)
    

    def custom_float_format(x):
        if pd.isna(x):
            return ''
        return f"{x:.2f}"
    
    # Print LaTeX version with custom formatting
    print(matrix_df.to_latex(index=False, float_format=custom_float_format))
else:
    print("No 'feature_selection_timing.parquet' files found.")

In [29]:
df = results_df.copy()
df = prepare_results(df, replacements)

df['label'] = df.apply(lambda row: row['category'] + '_' + row['label'] if '_' not in row['label'] else row['label'], axis=1).replace("ALL_ALL", 'ALL').replace("DK_DK", 'DK')


median_duration = df.groupby(['label', 'lag_type'])['duration'].median().reset_index(name='median_duration')


median_duration = median_duration.merge(df[['label', 'category']].drop_duplicates(), on='label', how='left')


median_duration['Method'] = median_duration['label'].str.split('_').str[1]


desired_order = ['ALL', 'TFS', 'CD', 'DK', 'DK&CDV', 'DK&CDL']
median_duration['category'] = pd.Categorical(median_duration['category'], categories=desired_order, ordered=True)


median_duration = median_duration.sort_values(['category', 'Method', 'lag_type'])

median_duration['median_duration'] = median_duration['median_duration'].round(4)

# Reorder columns: category, Method, lag_type, median_duration
median_duration = median_duration[['category', 'Method', 'lag_type', 'median_duration']]

median_duration.columns = ['Category', 'Method', 'Lag_type', 'Median duration']

# Display separate tables for each lag_type
for lag_type in ['all_lags', 'select_lag']:
    print(f"\nMedian Duration for {lag_type}:")
    lag_df = median_duration[median_duration['Lag_type'] == lag_type]
    lag_df = lag_df.sort_values('Median duration', ascending=False)
    display(lag_df)
    print(lag_df.to_latex(index=False))

Median Duration for all_lags:
Category Method Lag_type Median duration

7 CD VARL all_lags 19.8034

Durations for every model¶

In [30]:
df = results_df.copy()
df = prepare_results(df, replacements)

df['label'] = df.apply(lambda row: row['category'] + '_' + row['label'] if '_' not in row['label'] else row['label'], axis=1).replace("ALL_ALL", 'ALL').replace("DK_DK", 'DK')

# Get unique models
models = df['model'].unique()

# Loop per ML algorithm
for model in sorted(models):
    print(f"\nTraining Time for Model: {model}")
    
    # Filter df for this model
    df_model = df[df['model'] == model].copy()
    
    # Compute median duration per label and lag_type
    median_duration = df_model.groupby(['label', 'lag_type'])['duration'].median().reset_index(name='median_duration')
    
    # Merge category
    median_duration = median_duration.merge(df_model[['label', 'category']].drop_duplicates(), on='label', how='left')
    
    # Split label to get Method (part after '_')
    median_duration['Method'] = median_duration['label'].str.split('_').str[1]
    
    # Define desired category order
    desired_order = ['ALL', 'TFS', 'CD', 'DK', 'DK&CDV', 'DK&CDL']
    median_duration['category'] = pd.Categorical(median_duration['category'], categories=desired_order, ordered=True)
    
    # Sort by category, then by Method, then by lag_type
    median_duration = median_duration.sort_values(['category', 'Method', 'lag_type'])
    
    # Round to 4 decimals
    median_duration['median_duration'] = median_duration['median_duration'].round(4)
    
    # Reorder columns: category, Method, lag_type, median_duration
    median_duration = median_duration[['category', 'Method', 'lag_type', 'median_duration']]
    
    median_duration.columns = ['Category', 'Method', 'Lag_type', 'Median duration']
    
    # Display separate tables for each lag_type
    for lag_type in ['all_lags', 'select_lag']:
        print(f"\nMedian Duration for {lag_type}:")
        lag_df = median_duration[median_duration['Lag_type'] == lag_type]
        lag_df = lag_df.sort_values('Median duration', ascending=False)
        display(lag_df)

Evaluation effect DK quality¶

Evaluate what happens when the DK degrades

In [31]:
current_path = Path(__file__).resolve().parent if '__file__' in globals() else Path().resolve()

path_to_save_visuals = current_path.parent / 'visual'
save_type = ".eps"

experiment = 3

folder_path = current_path.parent.parent / 'data' / 'gold' / f'experiment_{experiment}'
In [32]:
results_df_impact, results_df_window_impact, results_df_all_impact = get_results(folder_path)

df = results_df_impact.copy()

list_results = []
number_experiment = 5

for experiment in results_df_impact['file'].unique():
    df = results_df_impact[results_df_impact['file'] == experiment]

    df['file'] = df['file'].str.replace(r'df_exp_\d+', 'df_exp_x' + str(number_experiment), regex=True)
    list_results.append(df.copy())

    number_experiment -= 1

results_df_impact = pd.concat(list_results, ignore_index=True)

Try using .loc[row_indexer,col_indexer] = value instead

  df['file'] = df['file'].str.replace(r'df_exp_\d+', 'df_exp_x' + str(number_experiment), regex=True)
In [33]:
df = results_df_impact.copy()
df = prepare_results(df, replacements)

df_filtered = df[(df['model'] == 'MLP') & (df['category'] == 'DK&CDV')]

aggregated_df = df_filtered.groupby('file_target').agg({
    'mae': 'median',
    'mae_window': 'median',
    'wape': 'median',
    'wape_window': 'median',
    'rmse': 'median',
    'rmse_window': 'median'
}).reset_index()

aggregated_df = aggregated_df.sort_values('mae')
aggregated_df['mae'] = aggregated_df['mae'].round(4)
aggregated_df['mae_window'] = aggregated_df['mae_window'].round(4)
aggregated_df['wape'] = aggregated_df['wape'].round(2)
aggregated_df['wape_window'] = aggregated_df['wape_window'].round(2)
aggregated_df['rmse'] = aggregated_df['rmse'].round(4)
aggregated_df['rmse_window'] = aggregated_df['rmse_window'].round(4)
display(aggregated_df)
file_target mae mae_window wape wape_window rmse rmse_window

In [34]:
df = results_df_impact.copy()
df = prepare_results(df, replacements)


df['experiment'] = df['file'].str.extract(r'df_exp_x(\d+)')[0].astype(int)


grouped_df = df.groupby(['experiment', 'label'])['mae_window'].median().reset_index()


label_color_map = {
    'DK&CDL_PCMCI': "#a0e8ea",
    'DK&CDV_PCMCI': "#b795c9",
    'PCMCI': "#66b366",
}

# Plot
sns.set_style("whitegrid")
plt.figure(figsize=(12, 8))


for label in grouped_df['label'].unique():
    df_label = grouped_df[grouped_df['label'] == label].sort_values('experiment')
    if label == 'PCMCI':

        plt.plot(df_label['experiment'], df_label['mae_window'], marker='', linestyle='--', color=label_color_map[label], linewidth=3, label=label)
    else:

        plt.plot(df_label['experiment'], df_label['mae_window'], marker='o', linestyle='-', color=label_color_map[label], linewidth=3, label=label)

plt.xlabel('Number of variables in the domain knowledge graph')
plt.ylabel('Median MAE after the interventions')
plt.legend(title='Method', bbox_to_anchor=(1.05, 1), loc='upper left')
plt.gca().invert_xaxis() 


unique_experiments = sorted(grouped_df['experiment'].unique())
plt.xticks(unique_experiments)

plt.tight_layout()

if save_visuals:
    plt.savefig(str(path_to_save_visuals) + '/' + 'degradation_dk' + save_type, dpi=resolution, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()

The PostScript backend does not support transparency; partially transparent artists will be rendered opaque.

Sensitivity analysis¶

Evalaute what happens when changing thresholds for a causal discovery methods

In [35]:
current_path = Path(__file__).resolve().parent if '__file__' in globals() else Path().resolve()

path_to_save_visuals = current_path.parent / 'visual'
save_type = ".eps"

experiment = 4

folder_path = current_path.parent.parent / 'data' / 'gold' / f'experiment_{experiment}'

results_df_sensitivity, results_df_window_sensitivity, results_df_all_sensitivity = get_results(folder_path)
In [36]:
df_fs = results_df_sensitivity.copy()
df_fs = prepare_results(df_fs, replacements)


df_fs['nr_features'] = df_fs['features'].apply(lambda x: len(x))


df_fs['CD'] = df_fs['label'].str.split('_').str[0]


df_fs['label'] = df_fs['label'].str.split('_').str[-1]


df_fs = df_fs[~df_fs['label'].str.contains('ALL|DK', case=False, na=False)]

df_fs = df_fs[['CD', 'label', 'mae', 'mae_window', 'lag_type','file_target', 'model', 'n features']]


grouped_df = df_fs.groupby(['CD', 'label', 'lag_type', 'model']).agg({
    'mae': 'median',
    'mae_window': 'median'
}).reset_index()


print("Median MAE and MAE_WINDOW grouped by CD, label, lag_type, model (sorted by ascending MAE):")
sorted_df = grouped_df.sort_values(by='mae', ascending=True)
display(sorted_df)


if grouped_df['label'].dtype == 'object':
    grouped_df['label_numeric'] = pd.factorize(grouped_df['label'])[0]
else:
    grouped_df['label_numeric'] = grouped_df['label']


correlation_mae = grouped_df[['label_numeric', 'mae']].corr()
print("Correlation between label_numeric and mae:")
print(correlation_mae)


correlation_mae_window = grouped_df[['label_numeric', 'mae_window']].corr()
print("\nCorrelation between label_numeric and mae_window:")
print(correlation_mae_window)

In [37]:
df_fs = results_df_sensitivity.copy()
df_fs = prepare_results(df_fs, replacements)

df_fs = df_fs[df_fs['model'].isin(['MLP'])]

categories_model_type = {
    'TSMixerx': 'TSForecasting',
    'NHITS': 'TSForecasting',
    'LSTM': 'TSForecasting',
    'LR': 'Regression', 
    'XGB': 'Regression', 
    'LGBM': 'Regression',
    'MLP': 'Regression'
}
df_fs['model_category'] = df_fs['model'].map(categories_model_type)

df_fs['nr_features'] = df_fs['features'].apply(lambda x: len(x))


df_fs['CD'] = df_fs['label'].str.split('_').str[0]


df_fs['label'] = df_fs['label'].str.split('_').str[-1]


max_features_per_file = df_fs[df_fs['label'].str.contains('ALL', case=False, na=False)].groupby('file_target')['nr_features'].max()


df_all = df_fs[df_fs['label'].str.contains('ALL', case=False, na=False)].copy()
all_baseline = df_all.groupby(['lag_type', 'model']).agg({
    'mae': 'median',
    'mae_window': 'median'
}).reset_index()


df_fs = df_fs[~df_fs['label'].str.contains('ALL|DK', case=False, na=False)]


df_fs['max_features'] = df_fs['file_target'].map(max_features_per_file)
df_fs['feature_proportion'] = (df_fs['nr_features'] / df_fs['max_features']) * 100

df_fs = df_fs[['CD', 'label', 'mae', 'mae_window', 'lag_type','file_target', 'model', 'n features', 'nr_features', 'feature_proportion']]


df_fs['label_numeric'] = pd.to_numeric(df_fs['label'], errors='coerce')


grouped_df = df_fs.groupby(['CD', 'label_numeric', 'lag_type', 'model']).agg({
    'mae': 'median',
    'mae_window': 'median',
    'feature_proportion': 'mean'
}).reset_index()


print("Median MAE and MAE_WINDOW grouped by CD, label_numeric, lag_type, model (sorted by ascending MAE):")
sorted_df = grouped_df.sort_values(by='mae', ascending=True)
display(sorted_df)


correlation_mae = grouped_df[['label_numeric', 'mae']].corr()
print("Correlation between label_numeric and mae:")
print(correlation_mae)


correlation_mae_window = grouped_df[['label_numeric', 'mae_window']].corr()
print("\nCorrelation between label_numeric and mae_window:")
print(correlation_mae_window)


import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import seaborn as sns

sns.set_style("whitegrid")

metrics = ['mae', 'mae_window']


colors = {'all_lags': 'darkblue', 'select_lag': "#FF7700"}


unique_cds = grouped_df['CD'].unique()

for cd in unique_cds:
    df_cd = grouped_df[grouped_df['CD'] == cd]
    if df_cd.empty:
        continue
    

    fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, len(metrics), figsize=(12, 6))
    if len(metrics) == 1:
        axes = [axes]
    

    legend_handles = []
    legend_labels = []
    

    all_labels = df_cd['label_numeric'].unique()
    sorted_labels = sorted(all_labels, key=float)
    sorted_label_strings = [str(x) for x in sorted_labels]
    
    for i, metric in enumerate(metrics):
        ax = axes[i]
        

        if metric == 'mae':
            ylabel = 'Median MAE for the complete test set'
        elif metric == 'mae_window':
            ylabel = 'Median MAE after the interventions'
        else:
            ylabel = metric.upper()
        

        for lag_type in df_cd['lag_type'].unique():
            df_lag = df_cd[df_cd['lag_type'] == lag_type].groupby('label_numeric').agg({
                metric: 'mean',
                'feature_proportion': 'mean'
            }).reset_index()
            

            df_lag = df_lag.sort_values('label_numeric')
            
            line, = ax.plot(df_lag['label_numeric'], df_lag[metric], marker='o', color=colors[lag_type], label=f'{lag_type}')
            if f'{lag_type}' not in legend_labels:
                legend_handles.append(line)
                legend_labels.append(f'{lag_type}')
            
            all_value = all_baseline[all_baseline['lag_type'] == lag_type][metric].values
            if len(all_value) > 0:
                hline = ax.axhline(y=all_value[0], color='black', linestyle='-', linewidth=1.5, alpha=0.7)
                ax.text(x=min(sorted_labels), y=all_value[0], s='ALL', ha='left', va='bottom', fontsize=10, color='black')
        
        ax.set_xlabel('Threshold')
        ax.set_ylabel(ylabel)
        ax.set_xticks(sorted_labels)
        ax.set_xticklabels(sorted_label_strings)
        ax.set_ylim(0, 0.33)
        ax.grid(True, color='lightgray', alpha=0.5)
        ax.legend().set_visible(False)
    
    fig.legend(legend_handles, legend_labels, loc='lower center', bbox_to_anchor=(0.5, -0.05), ncol=len(legend_labels), fontsize=14)
    
    plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0.05, 1, 1]) 

    if save_visuals:
        plt.savefig(str(path_to_save_visuals) + '/' + 'sensitivity_analysis_threshold' + save_type, dpi=resolution, bbox_inches='tight')
    plt.show()
